summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 2 testing of Shape Inexplicavel workout and progress features. Backend achieved 100% success rate (14/14 tests). Frontend testing verified all major flows including login, workout plans, sessions, progress tracking, and navigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation click intercepted by overlay during weight logging modal interaction
ui_bugs.details: Minor timing issue when navigating while modal animations are active. Workaround: Add small delay after modal interactions

passed_tests: Home page displays with tactical greeting and user data
Bottom navigation shows all 5 tabs (Hoje, Chat, Refeicoes, Treino, Progresso)
Settings icon visible and accessible in header
Workout plans A, B, C visible with exercise details
Active session interface with sets/reps/weight inputs
Progress page weight chart and statistics
Quick action navigation to workout page
All backend API endpoints (14/14 tests passed)
Progress summary with all required fields
